Model: Linear
mu_chieff(z) = ((0.04785507963043595 - (x3 * 0.015735226933979857)) - ((x7 ^ (log(1.6858623935713657) / (x7 ^ x3))) * (0.00039050348188274914 / x7))) - -0.004164913364919633
log sigma_chieff(z) = ((x0 / 1.0499049258459998) ^ (1.005421141787663 ^ (x5 ^ (square(x2) ^ (((x8 ^ x4) * x3) ^ x1))))) + -2.704486354297169
